column1: title|complexity|area|type|summary|acceptance|status

Implement seed schema validator|trivial|area:fuzzer|type:task|Validate incoming seed payloads against a strict schema before execution.|Reject malformed fields with clear errors and accept valid payloads.|
Add deterministic PRNG adapter|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Provide deterministic pseudo random generation keyed by seed id.|Same seed always produces same mutation stream across runs.|

Create numeric boundary mutator for i128 and u128|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Generate edge values near overflow and underflow ranges.|Mutator emits boundary vectors and test asserts include min max neighbors.|implemented

Add Stellar address mutation strategy|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Mutate account contract and muxed address formats with validity toggles.|Supports valid and invalid address generation paths with unit coverage.|

Add vec and map size stress mutator|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Exercise container growth and sparse key patterns for host function inputs.|Configurable min and max sizes with deterministic generation.|
Add authorization mode matrix runner|high|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Run each seed across enforce record and record_allow_nonroot modes.|Output stores per mode result and mismatch summary.|
Add simulation timeout guardrails|trivial|area:runtime|type:task|Stop long running simulation attempts and mark as timeout class.|Timeout threshold is configurable and surfaced in run metadata.|
Build failure classification taxonomy|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Map raw failures to stable categories like auth budget state and xdr.|Classification logic is documented and covered by tests.|
Persist failing case bundle format|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Store seed input context env and failure payload in a portable bundle.|Bundle can be saved loaded and versioned with schema field.|
Add replay command for single seed|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Create CLI command to replay one exact seed bundle end to end.|Replay returns same class and signature as original failure.|

Export failing seed as Rust regression fixture|high|area:generator|type:feature|Generate a Rust test snippet from a failing bundle for contract suites.|Output compiles in sample harness and fails before patch succeeds after patch.|

Export failing seed as JSON scenario|trivial|area:generator|type:task|Allow exporting normalized JSON scenario for cross tool reuse.|Scenario includes seed id input payload mode and expected failure class.|
Add reproducer shrinking algorithm|high|area:generator|type:feature|Minimize failing inputs while preserving failure signature.|Shrunk case is smaller and still reproduces same signature.|
Add crash signature hashing|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Create stable signature hash from category stack and key fields.|Equivalent failures produce identical signature hash.|
Add duplicate crash de-dup index|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Group repeated failures by signature to reduce noise.|Dashboard and CLI report grouped counts and newest sample.|
Add regression suite loader|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Load previously exported fixtures and execute as regression pack.|Suite runner returns pass fail summary and per case status.|
Build run history table UI|trivial|area:web|type:task|Implement dashboard table listing run id status duration and seed count.|Table supports basic pagination and links to run detail.|implemented
Build crash detail drawer UI|medium|area:web|type:feature|Show failure category signature payload and replay action in side drawer.|Drawer opens from history row and preserves browser state.|
Add state change diff view|high|area:web|type:feature|Render readable before and after ledger entry changes from simulation output.|Diff highlights created updated deleted changes with type labels.|
Build resource fee insight panel|medium|area:web|type:feature|Display cpu mem and min resource fee with warning thresholds.|Panel flags expensive runs and links to related run details.|
Add run filtering by area and severity|trivial|area:web|type:task|Enable filtering runs by component and severity tag.|Filters are reflected in URL query params.|
Add shareable permalink for run report|medium|area:web|type:feature|Create stable URL for a specific run and applied filters.|Copy link action shares the same report view for other users.|
Add theme tokens for accessibility contrast|trivial|area:web|type:task|Define color tokens with accessible contrast for key statuses.|Status chips pass WCAG AA contrast checks.|
Add explicit loading and error states|trivial|area:web|type:task|Implement non-blocking loading and actionable error states across dashboard.|No blank screens when API request fails or is pending.|

Create architecture diagram documentation|trivial|area:docs|type:task|Document system architecture including data flow between fuzzer generator and web.|Diagram and text are included in repository docs.|
Write contributor local setup guide|trivial|area:docs|type:task|Provide step by step setup for Node Rust and tooling prerequisites.|New contributor can run web and core tests in under 20 minutes.|
Add label bootstrap automation|trivial|area:ops|type:task|Automate creation of standard labels used by backlog and triage.|Script is idempotent and safe for repeated execution.|

Document issue triage board queries|medium|area:ops|type:feature|Add saved search conventions for pending review stale and blocked issues.|Maintainers can follow documented queries without manual guesswork.|

Add security policy and disclosure path|medium|area:security|type:feature|Define coordinated vulnerability disclosure process and response expectations.|Security policy file exists and linked from README.|
Add CODEOWNERS for review routing|trivial|area:ops|type:task|Define ownership paths for web core and docs to speed review assignment.|Pull requests auto-request maintainers based on changed paths.|

Add contributor SLA section with timers|medium|area:ops|type:feature|Set response and review timing commitments for wave sprint operations.|Playbook includes measurable SLA targets and escalation path.|

Add quality gates checklist to PR flow|medium|area:ops|type:feature|Extend PR process with reproducibility and regression gate checklist.|Checklist is visible in template and referenced in contributing guide.|

Add corpus seed import command|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Import external seed files into the local mutation corpus with validation.|Import rejects malformed files and reports accepted seed counts.|
Add corpus seed export command|trivial|area:fuzzer|type:task|Export current corpus to portable seed archive for sharing.|Archive can be re-imported and preserves deterministic order.|implemented

Implement weighted mutator scheduler|high|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Schedule mutators by configurable weights to balance exploration and exploitation.|Run stats show mutator usage distribution matches configured weights.|implemented

Add bytestring entropy mutator|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Generate high and low entropy byte patterns for payload stress cases.|Entropy profile appears in run metadata and tests cover edge ranges.|
Add enum variant flip mutator|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Mutate enum-like inputs by switching variants and invalid tags.|Runner records invalid tag failures distinctly from runtime faults.|

Add decimal precision mutation strategy|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Fuzz decimal scale and precision boundaries used in token math.|Boundary cases include rounding traps and overflow near limits.|
Add mutation budget limiter per run|trivial|area:fuzzer|type:task|Cap mutation attempts per run to avoid runaway jobs.|Limiter stops at configured budget and reports skipped attempts.|

Implement seed prioritization by novelty|high|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Prioritize seeds that produce unseen crash signatures or state diffs.|Prioritizer improves unique signature discovery rate in benchmark run.|

Add deterministic parallel worker partitioning|high|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Split seed execution across workers while preserving deterministic replay.|Replay output remains stable with one or many workers.|
Add fuzz campaign preset profiles|trivial|area:fuzzer|type:task|Define campaign presets for smoke nightly and deep runs.|Preset selection changes runtime budget and mutation intensity predictably.|
Implement run metadata schema versioning|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Version run metadata format to support safe future migrations.|Older metadata can be read and upgraded without data loss.|
Add retry strategy for transient RPC failures|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Retry idempotent simulation calls on transient network errors.|Retries are bounded and include backoff with jitter.|

Capture RPC request response envelopes|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Store sanitized request and response envelopes for reproducibility auditing.|Sensitive fields are redacted and replay still works.|
Add run cancellation command|trivial|area:runtime|type:task|Allow maintainers to cancel active runs gracefully.|Cancelled runs end in terminal state with partial summary.|
Add stale run detector|trivial|area:runtime|type:task|Detect and mark runs that stop producing progress for too long.|Detector marks stale status and surfaces recovery hint.|

Implement run resume from checkpoint|high|area:runtime|type:feature|Resume interrupted campaigns from persisted checkpoints.|Resumed run continues from last checkpoint without reprocessing completed seeds.|

Add environment fingerprinting to bundles|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Record runtime environment details for replay consistency checks.|Replay warns when environment fingerprint differs materially.|implemented
Add failure artifact compression|trivial|area:runtime|type:task|Compress stored artifacts to reduce disk footprint of long campaigns.|Compression reduces storage while preserving artifact integrity.|

Add retention policy for run artifacts|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Apply configurable retention windows for old run artifacts.|Policy can keep latest failures while pruning old non-critical data.|

Implement run health summary endpoint|medium|area:runtime|type:feature|Provide health summary with throughput failures and queue depth metrics.|Endpoint returns machine-readable summary for dashboard polling.|

Generate TypeScript reproducer snippets|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Export failing case as TypeScript reproducer helper for web tests.|Generated snippet executes with documented dependencies and expected assertion.|
Add markdown crash report exporter|trivial|area:generator|type:task|Export crash details to markdown for issue attachments.|Report includes signature context and replay command.|

Implement fixture metadata manifest|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Store fixture metadata in manifest for indexing and compatibility checks.|Manifest validates fixture presence and schema version at load time.|
Add fixture compatibility checker|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Check whether fixture set matches current engine schema and capabilities.|Checker reports actionable migration warnings.|
Create automatic regression grouping|high|area:generator|type:feature|Group regression fixtures by domain risk area and expected failure mode.|Suite runner can execute selected groups independently.|

Add baseline snapshot comparison|high|area:generator|type:feature|Compare current run signatures against baseline snapshot to detect regressions.|Comparison output distinguishes new fixed and recurring signatures.|

Add fixture sanitization pipeline|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Sanitize fixtures to remove unsafe payload fragments before sharing publicly.|Sanitized fixtures preserve repro value without leaking sensitive data.|

Implement flaky reproducer detector|medium|area:generator|type:feature|Detect non-deterministic repro cases and flag them for quarantine.|Detector reports flake rate and excludes unstable fixtures from CI pack.|

Add deterministic ordering for exported suites|trivial|area:generator|type:task|Ensure stable fixture order across exports for clean diffs.|Consecutive exports produce byte-identical ordering when unchanged.|
Add fixture lint command|trivial|area:generator|type:task|Lint fixture files for schema and naming conventions.|Lint fails on malformed fixture metadata or duplicate ids.|

Build campaign configuration form|medium|area:web|type:feature|Create UI form for run profile seed source and auth mode settings.|Submitted config persists and launches campaign with expected parameters.|
Add live run progress timeline|high|area:web|type:feature|Render live timeline of campaign milestones and failure discovery events.|Timeline updates incrementally and supports pause resume markers.|
Add signature trend charts|medium|area:web|type:feature|Visualize crash signature frequency trends across recent runs.|Charts support area and severity filters with readable legends.|
Implement failure cluster view|high|area:web|type:feature|Cluster related crashes by signature and context to reduce triage noise.|Cluster view links to representative sample and grouped count.|
Add keyboard navigation in dashboard|trivial|area:web|type:task|Enable keyboard shortcuts for table navigation and detail views.|Core flows are usable without mouse and documented in help panel.|
Add empty-state onboarding cards|trivial|area:web|type:task|Show actionable onboarding cards when no runs or crashes exist.|Cards guide first campaign setup and docs entry points.|
Build replay from UI action|medium|area:web|type:feature|Trigger seed replay directly from crash detail panel.|Replay action shows status and links to resulting run.|
Add downloadable run artifact bundle|medium|area:web|type:feature|Provide one-click download of run artifacts for offline analysis.|Download contains metadata traces and fixture exports.|

Add role-based maintainer view toggles|medium|area:web|type:feature|Support maintainer-focused view presets for triage and review cadence.|Toggle persists per user and changes default dashboard modules.|
Add markdown rendering for issue-ready reports|trivial|area:web|type:task|Render issue report markdown preview before export or copy.|Preview matches exported markdown structure and formatting.|

Write reproducibility guarantees documentation|medium|area:docs|type:feature|Document deterministic guarantees and known limits across environments.|Docs include examples and troubleshooting for mismatched replay outcomes.|
Write mutation strategy handbook|medium|area:docs|type:feature|Describe each mutator goal risk coverage and usage guidance.|Handbook links strategy choices to realistic contract failure classes.|
Document wave issue complexity rubric|trivial|area:docs|type:task|Publish rubric for assigning trivial medium and high complexity accurately.|Rubric includes examples from current backlog areas.|

Create maintainer onboarding checklist|trivial|area:docs|type:task|Add checklist for new maintainers joining project operations during wave.|Checklist covers labels triage review SLA and resolution policy.|

Write release process documentation|medium|area:docs|type:feature|Document release tagging changelog and backward compatibility workflow.|Release process can be executed by a new maintainer without guesswork.|
Add contributor debugging playbook|medium|area:docs|type:feature|Document debugging steps for common build test and replay failures.|Playbook maps symptoms to likely fixes with commands.|

Document Security Hardening Assumptions|medium|area:security|type:task|Document the security hardening assumptions covering fuzz input handling and artifact storage.|Documentation exists in README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and MAINTAINER_WAVE_PLAYBOOK.md with clear trust boundaries and mitigation controls.|implemented
Add issue dependency mapping guide|trivial|area:docs|type:task|Explain how to track blocking and blocked relationships across issues.|Guide standardizes dependency notation in issue bodies.|
Add backlog freshness review workflow|medium|area:ops|type:feature|Introduce recurring process to retire stale tasks and refine active scope.|Workflow defines cadence owner and stale criteria.|

Implement issue audit script for duplicates|medium|area:ops|type:feature|Create script to detect near-duplicate issue titles and overlapping scope.|Audit report flags possible collisions before issue publishing.|

Add maintainer response-time dashboard query|trivial|area:ops|type:task|Create query set to track first response and review turnaround metrics.|Queries are documented and reusable across wave cycles.|
Add RFC template for high-complexity work|trivial|area:ops|type:task|Provide RFC template required before starting selected high tasks.|Template includes motivation design risks and rollout plan.|
Add weekly triage cadence automation|medium|area:ops|type:feature|Automate recurring triage reminders and issue queue snapshots.|Automation posts summary with pending high-priority actions.|

Add stale label auto-suggestion script|trivial|area:ops|type:task|Create script to suggest stale labels based on inactivity and blockers.|Script outputs proposed labels without mutating issues by default.|

Define escalation policy for blocked PRs|medium|area:ops|type:feature|Set explicit escalation path when contributor PRs are blocked by dependencies.|Policy includes timing thresholds and communication template.|

Add conflict-of-interest maintainer policy|medium|area:security|type:feature|Define conflict-of-interest handling for issue assignment and review decisions.|Policy is published and linked from maintainer playbook.|

Create threat model draft for artifact handling|high|area:security|type:feature|Build threat model for input ingestion artifact storage and report export.|Threat model lists abuse cases mitigations and open risks.|

Add dependency update safety policy|medium|area:security|type:feature|Define policy for dependency updates including review and rollback requirements.|Policy requires changelog review and post-update validation checklist.|

Implement secret scanning guidance for contributors|trivial|area:security|type:task|Document pre-commit secret scanning expectations and remediation steps.|Guide includes recommended tools and response process.|

Add mutation budget limiter per run|medium|area:fuzzer|type:feature|Cap mutation attempts per run to avoid runaway jobs via MutationBudget with configurable budget.|Limiter stops at configured budget and BudgetReport surfaces attempts_made and skipped counts.|implemented
